title: Wealth Is Natural and Constant
subtitle: An affirmation for settling into wealth as a steady, expected state rather than a temporary one
excerpt: A brief affirmation from Day 64 of a 12-week money program. The statement replaces the background assumption that wealth is precarious with a trained sense of it as a natural, ongoing condition. Use it when the 'what if it stops?' thought is present, even quietly.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 64 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 64 theme of a 12-week money program. The statement names wealth as natural and ongoing, the kind of statement the nervous system can hold as true when financial progress has been made but trust in its permanence hasn't yet caught up.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Say each word at the pace of a slow exhale.
Wealth is natural and constant. It flows to me, stays with me, and grows. I trust it to keep going.

The third line, 'I trust it to keep going', is the load-bearing part. It names the specific gap the Day 64 tapping script works with: not doubt about whether money is present, but doubt about whether it will stay.
Adapted from the Day 64 reframe theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
